dsl_rule.translation_notes: Dragonfly doji pattern approximated using: lower_wick > body (long lower shadow), body_pct < 0.05 (near-identical open/close), and close > prev_high (upward breakout). Entry restricted to bull market regime. Exit on breakout failure (close below prior low). Success rate of 57% in bull market noted in source but not directly encoded as statistical threshold. Hold period set conservatively at 20 days.

backtest_rule.reason: Dragonfly doji pattern approximated using: lower_wick > body (long lower shadow), body_pct < 0.05 (near-identical open/close), and close > prev_high (upward breakout). Entry restricted to bull market regime. Exit on breakout failure (close below prior low). Success rate of 57% in bull market noted in source but not directly encoded as statistical threshold. Hold period set conservatively at 20 days.

source_rule_text: Dragonfly Doji Pattern: A candlestick with opening and closing prices at or near the same level (allowing a few pennies difference), forming a doji shape. Entry signal occurs on breakout from the pattern.
